meaning: n.弹簧单高跷,该游戏的工具
examples: I remember wondering if there was a pogo stick in it.
When he came back in, he was carrying a beautiful pogo stick.
Before New Year, I told my mother that the only thing I wanted was a pogo stick.
Can Pogo get the critical mass of planes and customers to make that 1, 500-hour assumption work?
Old Pogo had it right: We have met the enemy and he is us!
